name: asynchronia
description: Project-specific automatic routing, ChatGPT Desktop live-host model inventory preflight, scope checks, and evidence workflows for every Codex task in the Asynchronia repository.

interface.shortDescription: Route tasks through live host inventory and scope preflight.
interface.longDescription: Provides mandatory routing, dynamically discovered ChatGPT Desktop list-models-for-host inventory, complete model-effort pair evaluation, retry-adjusted cost selection, same-thread CONTINUE gating, scope isolation, deployment verification, and acceptance evidence rules.
capabilities: Live ChatGPT Desktop host inventory authority
defaultPrompt: Dynamically locate the ChatGPT Desktop renderer mechanism and query list-models-for-host with hostId, includeHidden true, cursor, and limit.
Preserve the complete paginated live inventory and record bundle, renderer, timestamp, and raw/filtered hash provenance.
Include hidden models in the selectable matrix only when current host use_hidden_models is true.
Label user-confirmed snapshots, app-server evidence, and historical cache hints as fallbacks, never as live authority.
Use each authority-confirmed model's supported efforts and evaluate every available authority-confirmed model-effort pair.
Compare each effort with its adjacent efforts for the same model and identify the lowest reliable effort per model.
Recommend the option that minimizes expected total credits after retry and escalation risk.
Explain why the next cheaper plausible pair is insufficient and why the next more expensive plausible pair is unnecessary.
Pause with WAITING_FOR_MODEL_SELECTION and wait for exact same-thread CONTINUE before any edits.
Use the repository skill source under plugins/asynchronia/skills/ as the mandatory fallback if needed.
Run task-router, scope-isolation-check, and model-selector before implementation.
